name: qf_hypothesis_get
description: A falsifiable research claim that roots a betting-research lineage. Agents open one before building datasets, tickets, or evaluations so every subsequent artifact answers a named question.

name: qf_hypothesis_query
description: A falsifiable research claim that roots a betting-research lineage. Agents open one before building datasets, tickets, or evaluations so every subsequent artifact answers a named question.

offset.description: Rows to skip before returning results.

name: qf_event_get
description: A scheduled real-world contest (UFC bout, tennis match, football game) that markets and results attach to. Starts_at is the point-in-time fence for pre-event decisions.

name: qf_event_query
description: A scheduled real-world contest (UFC bout, tennis match, football game) that markets and results attach to. Starts_at is the point-in-time fence for pre-event decisions.

offset.description: Rows to skip before returning results.

name: qf_market_get
description: One bettable proposition on an event. Moneyline, spread, total, and prop are kinds of this single type — never separate object types.

name: qf_market_query
description: One bettable proposition on an event. Moneyline, spread, total, and prop are kinds of this single type — never separate object types.

offset.description: Rows to skip before returning results.

name: qf_ticket_get
description: The atomic proposed wager — a single or a parlay — emitted by strategies and graded in backtests. A one-leg ticket is still a ticket, never a separate type.

name: qf_ticket_query
description: The atomic proposed wager — a single or a parlay — emitted by strategies and graded in backtests. A one-leg ticket is still a ticket, never a separate type.

offset.description: Rows to skip before returning results.

name: qf_create_hypothesis
description: Open a new research hypothesis with claim, success criteria, and optional sources before any downstream ticket or evaluation work.

success_criteria.description: How an evaluation would support this claim.

name: qf_submit_ticket
description: Propose a single or parlay ticket with legs, combined price, and stake for simulated grading — never live order placement.

kind.description: Ticket shape: single leg or parlay.

legs.description: Leg payloads (market, side, price, captured_at) as JSON objects.

combined_price.description: Combined odds for the proposed ticket.
